name: @briangaoo/whoop-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server that wraps Whoop's private iOS API surface. 48 tools, read + write, structured zod-validated outputs, auto-refresh Cognito auth.
author: Brian Gao
_scripts_note: All workflows are `whoop-mcp <command>` (build, dev, dev:http, start, test, typecheck, auth, refresh, cloud, local, deploy, logs, ping, …). The only npm steps are `npm install` and, for the one-time build before the CLI is linked, `npx tsc`. See README → Get Started.
